meaning: adj.无忧无虑的,轻松愉快的,不负责的
examples: Chantal remembered carefree summers at the beach.
She had made their childhood so joyous and carefree.
I was heartsick, for I felt that the splendid years of my carefree childhood had come to an end.
After "a carefree adolescence and youth, " Francis joined the military and was taken prisoner.
The carefree fans and cheerleaders will return and the game will look robust and sunny.
